examples: They grow, they bulge, they stretch and sometimes they even painfully pull.
Only galaxies with a spherical bulge—like component appear to accommodate supermassive black holes.
After the war there was a bulge in the birth rate.
For a few, an opportunity came during the replacements crisis at the time of the Bulge.
And, in spite of all that bulge of flesh, an expression of some satisfaction and cunning.
